message:
bd-3iws: Verify pager integration for long content

The markdown scene already uses rich_rust::interactive::Pager correctly:
- Respects --no-interactive flag via cfg.is_interactive_allowed()
- Falls back to inline rendering when pager unavailable
- Gracefully handles missing pager programs (less, more)

Acceptance criteria met:
- Pager does not crash if less is missing (graceful fallback)
- --no-interactive disables pager usage entirely

Also:
- Add E2E test verifying pager is disabled with --no-interactive
- Fix test assertion for debug_tools scene name wrapping
- Apply cargo fmt to affected files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
